006package com.stuypulse.robot.constants;
007
008import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose3d;
009import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Rotation3d;
010import edu.wpi.first.math.util.Units;
011
012public class Cameras {
013
014        public static final Camera[] LimelightCameras = new Camera[] {
015                new Camera("limelight",
016                                new Pose3d(
017                                        Units.inchesToMeters(-12.109),
018                                        Units.inchesToMeters(-7.129),
019                                        Units.inchesToMeters(8.375), // TODO: get actual camera info
020                                new Rotation3d(
021                                        Units.degreesToRadians(180),
022                                        Units.degreesToRadians(28),
023                                        Units.degreesToRadians(180))))
024        };
025
026        public record Camera(String name, Pose3d location) {
027        }
028        // public static class Camera {
029        // private String name;
030        // private Pose3d location;
031        // public Camera(String name, Pose3d location) {
032        // this.name = name;
033        // this.location = location;
034        // }
035        // public String getName(){
036        // return name;
037        // }
038        // public Pose3d getLocation() {
039        // return location;
040        // }
041        // }
042}
